\tzpentry{ID4227}{Density}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4227 introduces Density as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$\rho_{\text{vac}}(r) \sim \sum_{n=0}^{\infty} (-1)^n \Gamma(n+\tfrac{1}{2}) K_n(|r-r_{\TZP}|/\xi)$
\]
